author: claude-code-agent
message: Batch scoped from existing open items (no duplicates); coverage-excluded files lower risk; sub-agents will track in pm.

patch.value: update.ts: added reconcileBlockedByDependency() + pre-mutate locateItem resolution; --blocked-by now adds a blocked_by dependency edge (mirrors create.ts), --unset blocked-by removes it, repoint replaces stale edge. Manual temp-dir smoke: edge_count 1 on set, 0 on clear. Added 3 regression tests to update-command.spec.ts (all green).

close.ts: (C3) always scan active children; under validate-close off emit informational closed_with_active_children warning (never blocks). (C4) on terminal close clear scalar blocked_by + blocked_reason + blocked_by dependency edges (keeps kyd6 invariant), annotate via closed_cleared_blocked_by. Manual smoke verified both; 2 new regression tests; close-command.spec 11/11 green.

U2: root cause was LIST_FILTER_FLAG_CONTRACTS missing --status (the one gap vs pm list --help); added it so the existing never-block typo normalization now resolves --statuss->--status (consistent with all other list flags). U3: added --list option as alias for --explore on package/extension (register-setup.ts readBoolean(explore,list) + option + EXTENSION_FLAG_CONTRACTS entry). Tests: bootstrap-args U2 unit + cli.integration U3; both green. Manual smoke confirmed.

query-ux-subagent (general-purpose) delivered S1+B2 within bounded files (search.ts/test.ts + specs). Coordinator-verified: tsc clean, search+test specs 73/73 green, diff stayed in-scope. S1: computeSemanticOrHybridHits returns embeddedItems; runSearch pushes search_<mode>_degraded:no_embedded_items:results_are_lexical when 0 (additive, never blocks, mode unchanged). B2: cmd alias for command + normalizeStructuredAddEntry rejects unknown keys (e.g. name=) with allowed-key list; bare commands incl ones with = unchanged. Sub-agent recommended CHANGELOG entries (coordinator will apply centrally).

calendar-ux-subagent delivered pm-uzmf(1+2)+CAL1 within bounded files (create.ts/update.ts/event-validation-messages.ts + specs); claimed+released pm-uzmf, commented both items. Coordinator-verified: tsc clean, create+update+calendar specs 111/111 green, scope correct, kyd6 regions untouched. Equal start/end -> instant event (end dropped); duration=<rel> via resolveEventEndAt reusing relative parser (mutually exclusive with end); schedule-less Event create warning event_without_schedule:<id>:no_time_set. Deferred compound +1d+2h / minute durations (need shared time.ts; duration= satisfies CAL1). CHANGELOG entries to apply centrally.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: CI feedback cycle 1: PR #45 'Gates (static)' failed — pm-kyd6 additions pushed runUpdate cyclomatic complexity 257->264 over the 260 budget. Fixed in commit 316284ef by extracting resolveBlockedByDependencyTarget + applyBlockedByDependencyEdge module-level helpers (pure refactor; behavior unchanged). Re-verified locally: full build OK, 1473 tests / 100% coverage, static gate passes. Pushed; awaiting CI re-run + AI-bot review.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: AI-bot review (all CI green: gates+tests+CodeRabbit+Sourcery+Gemini+codex). Actionable feedback to address: (1) gemini HIGH: type-guard document.metadata.blocked_by before .trim() in update.ts (crash risk; close.ts already guards). (2) coderabbit/codex MAJOR: semantic-degraded warning says results_are_lexical, but pure semantic mode returns empty hits (only hybrid includes keyword hits) -> make accurate / graceful. (3) coderabbit MAJOR: --status added to LIST_FILTER_FLAG_CONTRACTS but maybe not to TOOL_LIST_FILTER_OPTION_CONTRACTS -> verify list tool schema sync. (4) sourcery: duration path rejects equal start/end (zero duration) vs instant-event semantics -> align. (5) gemini/coderabbit: close.ts clear blocked_reason even without blocked_by + clear orphan blocked_by edges if scalar missing. (6) gemini HIGH: unresolved --blocked-by sets scalar+no edge (asymmetry) -> warn (never-block, mirrors parent-missing pattern). (7) sourcery/gemini: extract duplicated resolveEventEndAt to shared module. (8) coderabbit minor: CHANGELOG attribution pm-uzmf/CAL1. (9) coderabbit: harden S1 test with count/id. NOTE: coderabbit '.agents/pm direct edit' is a false positive (changes are pm-CLI-generated, not hand edits).

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Review-feedback round committed (993584e7) addressing all 4 bots: (1) update.ts type-guard blocked_by; (2) unresolved --blocked-by warns (blocked_by_unresolved, non-blocking); (3) search semantic empty-corpus degrades to keyword hits so results_are_lexical is accurate; (4) cli-contracts status added to TOOL_LIST_FILTER_OPTION_CONTRACTS; (5) close clears blocked_reason + orphan edges independently; (6) resolveEventEndAt de-duplicated into event-validation-messages.ts + zero-duration instant. CHANGELOG attribution clarified. 5 new/updated regression tests. Re-verified: 1473 tests/100% coverage, static gate passes, check-secrets clean. PR reply posted. Awaiting CI re-run + bot re-review.
